fact_id.description: Determine whether current medication includes an ACE inhibitor without assigning causation.

text.wording: Are you taking a blood pressure or heart medicine called an ACE inhibitor?
Does cold air trigger or worsen the cough?
Does exercise or physical activity trigger or worsen the cough?
Does the cough wake you at night or tend to be worse overnight?
Did the cough begin very suddenly, for example during eating or after something went down the wrong way?
Overall, is the cough improving, staying about the same, or getting worse?
After a coughing fit, do you make a whooping sound when breathing in?
Have you had persistent or worsening difficulty swallowing?
Do you have a condition or take a treatment that weakens your immune system?
Have you been having drenching or unusual night sweats?
At work, are you exposed to dust, fumes, smoke, chemicals, or other things that irritate your breathing?
When did the cough first start?
Do you get prolonged or repeated fits of coughing?
Has your voice been persistently hoarse or changed when you speak?
Have you had repeated chest or sinus infections?
Do you currently smoke, did you smoke in the past, or have you never smoked?
Are you bringing up any phlegm or mucus when you cough?
Apart from the cough, how unwell do you feel overall?
Have you had close contact with tuberculosis or another reason you may have been exposed to TB?
Have you lost weight without trying?
Have your ankles or lower legs become swollen?
Are you short of breath even while resting?
Do you have chest pain, pressure, tightness, or heaviness?
Have you or someone with you noticed new confusion or unusual drowsiness?
Do you also have a cough?

fact_id.display: Blue or Grey Lips or Skin

text.wording: Have your lips or skin looked unusually pale, blue, or grey?
How long have you been short of breath?
Does activity such as walking or climbing stairs bring it on or make it worse?
Have you had fever or felt feverish?
Have you coughed up any blood?
Have you had surgery recently or been unable to move around for several days?

fact_id.display: Waking at Night Short of Breath

text.wording: Do you wake from sleep short of breath or gasping?
Did the breathing difficulty start suddenly or gradually?
Is your breathing worse when lying flat, or do you need extra pillows to breathe comfortably?
Have you noticed your heart racing, skipping, or fluttering?
Is any chest pain sharp or worse when you breathe in?
How difficult is it to breathe right now, and can you speak in full sentences?
Do you currently smoke, did you smoke in the past, or have you never smoked?
Are you bringing up sputum or phlegm?
Is there a harsh or noisy sound when you breathe in, or a choking sensation?
Have you fainted, nearly fainted, or felt you might pass out?
Do you have new pain or swelling in one leg?
Have you ever had a blood clot in a leg or lung?
Have you noticed wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?
Do you have abdominal or stomach pain?
Have you had chills or shaking?
Have you or someone with you noticed new confusion, disorientation, or unusual drowsiness?
Do you also have a cough?
Have you had diarrhea or unusually loose stools?
How long have you had the fever or felt feverish?
Are you having any difficulty breathing?
Do you have a new or severe headache?
Do you have a condition or treatment that weakens your immune system?
Is your neck unusually stiff or painful to move?
Do you have a new purple, rapidly spreading, or non-blanching rash that does not fade when pressed?
Are you having extreme pain or discomfort anywhere?
Have you been in close contact with anyone who has been ill?
Do you have a new painful red or swollen skin area, wound, or drainage?
Do you have a sore throat?
Do you feel severely or unusually unwell overall?
Have you measured your temperature, and what was the highest reading?
Do you have pain or burning when urinating, urgency, or needing to urinate more often?
Have you been vomiting?

offer_explanation.en: Age and sex information match the breast-screening candidate rule; anatomy or surgery may require clarification.
offer_explanation.ko: 연령과 성별 정보상 국가 유방암검진 후보입니다. 개인의 장기·수술 상태에 따라 추가 확인이 필요할 수 있습니다.

text.en: When was your last mammogram?

offer_explanation.en: Age and sex information match the cervical-screening candidate rule; anatomy may require clarification.
offer_explanation.ko: 연령과 성별 정보상 국가 자궁경부암검진 후보입니다. 자궁경부 보유 여부 등 개인 상태에 따라 추가 확인할 수 있습니다.

text.en: When was your last cervical cytology test?

offer_explanation.en: Adults 50 or older match the national colorectal-screening age criterion.
offer_explanation.ko: 만 50세 이상은 국가 대장암검진 연령 후보입니다. 최근 분변잠혈검사나 대장내시경 이력을 확인할 수 있습니다.

text.en: When was your last FOBT or colonoscopy?
What was the result and follow-up recommendation?

offer_explanation.en: At least one cancer-screening eligibility rule matched, so the common cancer questionnaire is offered.
offer_explanation.ko: 연령·성별·위험조건상 하나 이상의 국가 암검진 후보가 있어 암검진 공통 문진을 안내합니다.

text.en: Do you currently have discomfort anywhere?
text.ko: 현재 신체 어느 부위에든 불편한 증상이 있나요?

text.en: Any unexplained weight loss in the past six months?
text.ko: 최근 6개월 동안 특별한 이유 없이 체중이 줄었나요?

text.en: Describe personal or family cancer history.

title.en: Korean national cancer screening common questionnaire

offer_explanation.en: Adults 40 or older match the national gastric-screening age criterion.
offer_explanation.ko: 만 40세 이상은 국가 위암검진 연령 후보입니다. 최근 검진 시기와 결과를 확인할 수 있습니다.

text.en: When was your last gastroscopy or upper GI series?
What was the result and follow-up recommendation?

offer_explanation.en: Age and a recorded liver-risk condition matched the liver-screening rule.
offer_explanation.ko: 만 40세 이상이며 입력된 간질환 위험요인이 있어 간암검진 관련 문진 후보입니다.

text.en: Do you know your hepatitis B status?
text.ko: B형간염 검사 또는 진단 상태를 알고 있나요?

text.en: Do you know your hepatitis C status?
text.ko: C형간염 검사 또는 진단 상태를 알고 있나요?

offer_explanation.en: Age and smoking history match the high-risk candidate rule; confirm official NHIS eligibility.
offer_explanation.ko: 연령과 입력된 흡연력이 국가 폐암검진 고위험 후보 조건에 해당합니다. 공식 대상 여부는 공단 확인이 필요합니다.

text.en: Confirm cigarettes per day and total smoking years.
text.ko: 하루 흡연량과 총 흡연기간을 확인해 주세요.

offer_explanation.en: You match the age criterion for the age-66 additional questionnaire.
offer_explanation.ko: 만 66세에 적용되는 생애전환기 추가 문진 후보입니다.

text.en: Have you noticed decline in memory or cognition?
Have you fallen during the past year?

offer_explanation.en: You match the age criterion for the general screening questionnaire; official NHIS entitlement requires confirmation.
offer_explanation.ko: 만 20세 이상 국가 일반건강검진 후보에 해당하여 공통 건강문진을 안내합니다. 실제 대상 항목은 국민건강보험공단에서 확인해야 합니다.

text.en: Do you currently have any symptoms?
Please describe major current or past conditions.
text.ko: 현재 또는 과거의 주요 질환을 알려주세요.

text.en: Please list current medication.
What is your smoking status?
Describe alcohol frequency and amount per occasion.
text.ko: 음주 빈도와 한 번에 마시는 양을 알려주세요.

text.en: Describe weekly physical activity.
Any additional concerns not covered?
text.ko: 질문에 없었던 걱정이나 전달할 내용이 있나요?

offer_explanation.en: General screening participants may be candidates for oral screening; confirm entitlement first.
offer_explanation.ko: 일반건강검진 대상자는 구강검진 문진 후보가 될 수 있습니다. 실제 대상 여부를 확인한 뒤 진행합니다.

text.en: Any tooth, gum, or chewing problems?
